_comment: Tier-1 head paraphrase batch (Sprint 4, decision 25). Each entry is a MILD paraphrase of the named criterion, authored by a big model (Opus) and spot-checked for drift. The words are deliberately lexically distinct from the catalog name so the round-trip exercises the voyage-3 VECTOR TAIL (the layer that regresses), not the exact-name/alias head. The label is by-construction (the `id`), so it stays E8-clean. `id` -> the source criterion; `text` -> the user-style paraphrase fed to groundMarket. Full 2486-paraphrase generation is deferred (sprint scope: head-only keeps turn 1 cheap).
